author: Márk N.
pros: As one of the largest hotel companies in Hungary, it is important for us to let all employees in our 16 hotels as well as our central office buliding feel in everyday work that we are one team. The platform and mobile app enables us to keep in touch with them, inform and inspire them. For 50 years, we are where life happens - and thanks for the application, noone misses the numerous innovations and news aiming at making the stay of our guest even more memorable.
cons: Enhancing penetration among beginner users is slow.

review_title: What features are most useful for you, what and how do you use them, what problem has the app solved
author: Anita S.
pros: The app was first and foremost introduced for the quick transfer of information. As we have employees working in several locations nationwide, we can get the most important information and requests to them in the most efficient and quickest way. By the 6th month after launch, we had reached a major milestone, which was the complete digitalisation of payroll. This not only made our HR processes faster, but also took sustainability into consideration. This will allow our employees to access and download their payrolls immediately after uploading them, and will allow them to download them when it is needed. In 2022, the "transfer" of M30 forms will also be done through this platform. You can do this with the use of the "Documents" function.The "Cafatéira function" has been found to be the best solution for the cafatéira declarations due at the beginning of each year. With this module, we were able to complete the task efficiently and quickly. Since we received positive feedback on the efficiency of the process in 2022, we would like to use this option again in 2023.
cons: When users are logging in, the username and password are often lost in the system. Automatic integration of the users are not yet possible.

review_title: An App for almost everything with friendly and professional support
description: We are very satisfied with this app.
author: Árpád J.
pros: The best function of the app is the administration menu item, it makes administration much easier, you don't have to keep in mind the tasks and the necessary parameters, and you don't have to write emails, document, etc.
cons: Some features are only available in the more expensive version or can be purchased separately.

author: Norbert N.
pros: Easy to use and implement. We are using the BC app for 900+ people, from the onboarding through the community and e-learning. The support is A+, flexible and in our sector this is one of the best way to step to a higher level.
cons: Could be improved the reporting system and the e-learning paths.
author_profession: HR development and internal communications Lead

description: It is a great app, helps a lot in internal communication and is constantly increasing the number of its services.
author: Anikó Z.
pros: - Easy set-up - Easy usage - Great customer support - Constantly developing
cons: - Some requests are processed more slowly due to a lack of adequate manpower (developers).

author: Teodóra M.
pros: I think every of menus ( news, noties, questionnaire, polls, quiz ) are useful and easy to use. I am satisfied the whole program, because helping increase the social wellbeing and integral communication in our company.
cons: Sometimes the program is too slow and occur.

review_title: Using the BC app for internal communication
description: We started to work with the app nearly a year ago and we reached more people within the company than ever before. It has great tools for communication: we can publish news or pictures in gallerys, set standard messages for feedbacks or manager recognitions, start surveys for organizing events, etc.
author: Szabina H.
pros: The most valuable resource is the BC team itself. They have excellent customer service, the dedicated personal advisor is always there to answer questions or help in case of doubt. They are highly creative minds and it's so inspiring to work with them.
cons: There is no cons in my oppinion. If there is something which does not work well for our needs or we experience some rooms for improvements, we can always approach the Blue Colibri Team and discuss about changes.

description: Very easey to tailor-made your own app! The BC team is always supporting you, as a customer, they are excellent, innovative, very customer-oriented!
author: Noémi V.
pros: More and more functions can be integrated and launcjed for the organsiation, as the time passs. We have began with a "base" app, and later we have began to use for more and more functions. Now or first though is to integrate BC app at our new HR soutuions, processes, communication.
cons: I can not mention kind of cons. It's worth to launch in your organisation!

review_title: Much more than we expected at the beginning
description: We have worked together for more than 2 years. BC offers great support, great b2b communication and develops rapidly. Throughout the two years many new features were introduced.We love that the app offers not only one feature but could be used in multiple ways. Makes measuring possible, and makes our colleagues accessible, and at the same time makes not just information but documents, feedbacks, learning, etc accessible for everyone in our company. And what is also important, makes two-way communication possible.As an admin, I can say that the app is logically built up and easy to use; as a user I find it absolutely user friendly.
author: Judit M.
pros: It could be used without an email address - for blue collar workers it's essential.Have a desktop and a mobile version, too. Makes it easy to access. The constant innovation that always brings something new.
cons: Some features are not that personalized. On one hand that is understandable, on the other hand sometimes those tiny developments could help a lot.

author: Imre Z.
pros: We like the news feed a lot - for example if we have newcomer employees, they introduce themselves. We write news about rules and tax changing, that can be inportant for our employees. We can make and write some funny and interesting storieson the news feed - that makes fun and people can talk about. There are different type of communities, that can make fun and give information for smaller groups - for example there are group for travel lovers, animal lovers, group for memes and so on. There will be a big game in connection with the Football World Chamionship. Our employees are there, they use it more or less, there are topics, what about they can talk during the lunch together - so a great opportunity to create a better teambuilding and have unified communication.
cons: Sometimes there are some bugs, fails - but the BlueColibri team usually react fast.

review_title: Good experiences in communication with external partners
description: We use the app for internal communication with our partners, not for internal company communication. Our users are from many different organisations, therefore we do not use all the features of the app. The communication and information spread is very easy with the app, the only challenge is to start the usage, but we received a lot of material (video, training material) to facilitate that.
author: Anna S.
pros: easy to use, informative, very good customer care
cons: We are satisfied with the product, we do not miss anything.

description: I heard positive feedback from all my colleagues, it's like a mini social media page inside the company. very user-friendly, both from the user and admin side
author: Eszter U.
pros: Very easy to use, user friendly. Every fetaure has its own logic. I was lucky enough to have a "pre boarding" session before I was started to use it, but I think even if you are a new user or admin you will feel comfortable using it very soon.
cons: There are so many functions and maybe at the beginning you might feel a little overwhelmed about how you will use them in the best possible way, without making them useless
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The most convenient solution is to communicate with the entire company at the same time!
author: Balázs H.
pros: The application is very user-friendly. Easy and quick installation, easy to understand. It ensures fast, smooth operation.
cons: If we are looking for individual development, that is quite a lot of time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Laszlo M.
pros: Easy implemeting, design, news feed, e-learning function
cons: Unique document-handling needed further developing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, clearly visible interface, diverse HR administration, which is a great help in everyday life; a cohesive force in the community.
author: Bernadett M.
pros: A really great internal communication and HR tool; professional Blue Colibri support team.
cons: Unfortunately we didn't start using it sooner.

description: It facilitates the flow of information. Company employees become accessible.
author: Kovács L.
pros: transparent, expandable, easy to use....
cons: I can't think of anything like that right now.

review_title: The perfect tool for improving internal communication
description: super team with a super product, nice and helpful staff
author: Barbara V.
pros: Since using the Blue Colibri app, we have opened up our internal communication possibilities. We can easily do many tasks that were difficult before. In particular, we have made huge strides in keeping blue collar workers informed. It is a great help that all content automatically appears in Ukrainian on the phones of our Ukrainian employees.Our workers are happy to share their mobility challenges, but they are also active in social spaces to share their experiences. Through e-learning materials and tests, we have made knowledge material more accessible for all departments and age groups, and they like the fact that they can choose when to listen and watch it. Our most active colleagues thank others with "thank you cards". We have already received ongoing help to get it off the ground, so it is a truly supported project. Despite the young age of our contact, he was able to provide a high level of professional support and ideas for an application tailored to our company. Another great help during the launch was and is Blue Colibri News, which provides us with tutorial videos available at any time. And with News, our enthusiasm for the content sharing capabilities of the app never wanes
cons: no such thing, everything that is available now is super

description: Very user-friendly interface. Countless processes and forms of communication can be integrated into the system. The imagination is really the only limit to what a company can use it for, and especially human resources, because even this can only bring really outstanding results if we invest in the right amount and quality of work.
author: Beáta H.
pros: Versatile usability. Each new module is a new inspiration in the development of cooperation between the company and the employee.
cons: I have no negative experience with the modules or the company.

author: Zsuzsa J.
pros: At first, our company only used the Blue Colibri app for internal communication. In this way, we could immediately provide reliable information to colleagues working at the other end of the country. Today, the functions that have been used have expanded with e-learning and an intranet. The app has a video library and working private and public groups as well. We use the chat wall and the test and voting interface. We are most loving that target groups can be set in a targeted manner, and that it is also possible to share galleries and videos. We can also create joint events. If we have a problem, the support helps us immediately. The application can be customized with unique logos and with a form of appearance. In the future, we would like to introduce the webshop and the performance evaluation interface as well. Today, Blue Colibri users form a real community, who meet regularly and share good practices.
cons: There are some function that are not flawless.

description: I would like to dig deeper, learn more and squeeze out everything :-) I'm happy to work with it.What's more, the company knows exactly how custommer support should function so a very big applause for them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: If you are not a huge multinational company with several locations and very expensive tools, Blue Colibri is just perfect for HR, Comms and Employees.Creativity has no limits really, you can shape your own site and improve the skin and content always. Great features (employee referal, thank you card option, webshop etc) which I think critical moments in a lifecycle of a company.
cons: Uploading a file is a bit circuitous but that's it for me

author: Anita K.
pros: I like the most about the app, that is user-friendly and comlpex
cons: There is a lot of development, and sometimes, in my opinion, it is not tested thoroughly enough.

review_title: Every company needs an app like Blue Colibri
author: Bianka B.
pros: I really like that this app keeps improving and has everything we need in one place – from internal communication to managing talents and learning. It even helps with referrals and internal job applications, making things easier for the team.
cons: There is nothing, I do not like and if there would be anything I would feel confident and safe telling my contact at Blue Colibri and I'm sure we could find a solution in a short time.

description: User-friendly, with many useful features and a super team of operators behind it. I can only recommend it.
author: Viktória R.
pros: It allows you to reach colleagues in several locations at the same time. Constantly evolving, listening to customer needs. Support is fast and efficient.
cons: Linking it to other systems is difficult. We wanted to synchronise users in this way, but it took several improvements.

author: Nikolett B.
pros: It's easy to use and the menu is simple but contains all we might need. I like that the mobile application allows us to reach the software anywhere. The games and quizzes are a fun part of the company's life.
cons: We could do with more customization options (especially in the news feed). For example to be able to attach links to pictures, or insert .xlsx and .docx files.

description: We decided to use Blue Colibri app in the beginning of 2020. The implementation was done rapidly and we can communicate with it easily during the COVID period. We can reach our colleagues so the communication became better.
author: Balázs J.
pros: It is easy to use and developed continuously. If we ha new request they help us to solve. Easy to make queries.
cons: Nothing is missing so this tool is perfect.
